title: Modular Exponentiation
description: Fast exponentiation under a modulus is the core operation behind key exchange and signature verification. It turns repeated multiplication into tractable computation on large numbers.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Introduces modular exponentiation in Bitcoin key math.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin: Finite Fields
resources.notes: Walks through exponentiation behavior in finite fields.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures for secp256k1
resources.notes: Spec-level context where modular exponentiation underpins group operations.
